In a 600 Hotel Pan, mix chicken brine, egg, baking soda, and cornstarch until homogenous
Add chicken to velvet, mix to coat all pieces of chicken
Rest for ~6-12 hours (overnight preferably).
Cook:
Arrange in single layers on perferated hotel pans, matching similar parts of sliced chicken together
Steam in Combi (212°F, full steam, middle fan)  for ~12 minutes.
Reserve to sheet trays after steaming, allow to cool in blast chiller.
Reserve in hotel pans until ready to cut.
